LEADERS IN MUSCULOSKELETAL CARE

Precision Care for Your Movement

Experience luxury orthopedic services designed to restore your lifestyle. Our elite physicians leverage cutting-edge joint preservation, robotic surgery, and sports medicine protocols.

Start Your Recovery Explore Treatments

25+
Years Experience
OUR SPECIALTIES

Comprehensive Spine & Joint Solutions

We treat a wide range of orthopedic conditions, providing tailored plans that combine medical excellence with rehabilitation care.

Sports Medicine

Innovative therapies and minimally invasive procedures to restore movement, relieve pain, and return athletes back to sports quickly.

Explore

Joint Replacement

Advanced robotic hip and knee resurfacing options tailored to improve anatomy and support weightless, pain-free walking.

Explore

Spine Surgery

Minimally invasive spine procedures to treat scoliosis, herniated discs, and spinal stenosis with swift recovery pathways.

Explore

Pediatric Orthopedics

Expert bone growth and musculoskeletal correction services for children, treating fractures and congenital deviations.

Explore

Hand & Wrist Care

Reconstruction and treatment for carpal tunnel, arthritis, tendon damage, and complex finger injuries.

Explore

Trauma & Fracture

Immediate diagnostic and advanced stabilization treatments for structural bone fractures and emergency trauma injuries.

Explore

Foot & Ankle Surgery

Advanced reconstructive treatments for ankle fractures, arthritis, tendon ruptures, and foot alignment issues.

Explore

Shoulder & Elbow

Complex rotator cuff repair, shoulder joint replacement, instability correction, and tennis elbow treatments.

Explore
CLINIC DISTINCTION

World-Class Clinical Standards

Robotic-Assisted Navigation

Our surgeons leverage computed tomography modeling systems that guide joint implants with accuracy down to sub-millimeters.

Ultra-Low Risk Protocols

We implement clinically proven safety measures, resulting in patient infection rates 90% below the national standard.

Elite Concierge Care

Every client is matched with a recovery manager who orchestrates logistics, pre-op, and tailored physical therapy directly.

Aura Surgical Suites

Joint Commission Accredited Facility

LEAD PHYSICIANS

SUCCESS DIALOGUES

Restored Mobility Stories

Read from clients who recovered structural movement and returned to their active lifestyles.

"After my robotic-assisted knee replacement with Dr. Chen, I walked pain-free within three weeks. The care coordination at Aura felt like a luxury retreat rather than standard medical care."

David L. Miller
Total Knee Replacement Patient

"As an avid golfer, spine pain threatened to end my hobby. Dr. Pendelton performed minimally invasive decompression, and I am back on the fairway without stiffness or soreness."

Clara Vance
Herniated Disc Patient

"My daughter's ACL tear was devastated news for her collegiate soccer plans. Dr. Jenkins performed a graft repair, and her strength scores now exceed her pre-injury baseline."

Marcus G. (Father of Chloe)
ACL Reconstruction Patient

Begin Your Journey to Movement

Book a premium diagnostic consult today. Provide your details below for a quick scheduling call.

AURA ORTHOPEDICS

Premium skeletal health and movement restoration. Restoring vitality, strength, and life coordinates to active individuals.
